prompt:
Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: hub-spoke.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 三种粒度：字符、词、子词

Matrix rows:
- 字符 → 无歧义、序列长、语义弱 → 例：自/然/语/言
- 词 → 符合直觉，中文需猜边界 → 例：自然语言/处理
- 子词 → 词表有限、可组合新词 → 例：自然/语言/处理

Bottom: RAG 里三种粒度分别服务倒排、BM25、LLM token

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: linear-progression.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 同一问句，三条链路

Flow left to right:
1. 用户问题
2. 分词 / tokenize（Seg）
3a. 倒排索引 IR（BM25）
3b. 向量检索（可选）
4. 大模型生成（LLM）

Note: 给倒排的分词 ≠ 给 GPT 的 token，不必强行统一

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: bento-grid.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 综合概念地图：分词与 Token 一览

Cells (2×4):
1. 分词 → 中文加隐形空格 → jieba / IK
2. Tokenization → 模型吃的碎片 → BPE / SentencePiece
3. Token → 计费与上下文单位 → max_tokens
4. 词表 → 认字表 → OOV 靠子词
5. OOV → 表外词 → 子词切分缓解
6. IR term → 倒排词项 → 先分词再索引
7. LLM token → API 长度 → 与 Word 字数不同
8. RAG 影响 → chunk/索引/计费 → 三套系统各用各的

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: comparison-matrix.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 从词袋到词项–文档矩阵

LEFT: 词袋模型 — 抖进袋子只数词频，丢掉词序
RIGHT: 矩阵示意 — 行=term，列=doc，格=出现次数
Example terms: 报销/年假/公司
Insight: 「公司」每篇都有 → 不能区分主题 → 需要 IDF

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: structural-breakdown.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: TF × IDF = 词项权重

Three panels:
1. TF — 词在这篇多显眼 — 计数或归一化
2. IDF — 全库越罕见越值钱 — log(N/df)
3. TF-IDF — 两者相乘 — 本篇主题词浮上来

Bottom: 稀有词命中一次 > 常见词命中三次

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: bento-grid.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 综合概念地图：TF-IDF 名词一览

Cells:
1. 词袋 BoW → 丢词序数词频
2. TF → 本篇词频
3. IDF → 逆文档频率
4. 停用词 → 公司/规定 → 删或降权
5. 余弦相似度 → 查询与文档比夹角
6. 稀疏矩阵 → 倒排 posting 存储
7. 局限 → 无语义/同义词
8. RAG 位置 → 基线或 Hybrid 稀疏翼

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: linear-progression.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: BM25 在 RAG 里站哪一步

Flow:
用户问题 → 分词 → BM25 倒排检索 → (可选)向量检索 → 融合 top-k → 拼 prompt 生成

Note: BM25 只捞候选，不生成答案
Output: score、rank、snippet

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: structural-breakdown.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: BM25 公式拆开读

Panels:
1. IDF 项 — 稀有词加分 — 与 TF-IDF 同族
2. TF 饱和项 — f/(f+k1) — 同一词多出现收益递减
3. 长度归一 — |d|/avgdl — 长文不能自动赢

Knobs: k1 控制饱和速度，b 控制长度惩罚
Footer note: Elasticsearch 默认 similarity: BM25

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: bento-grid.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 综合概念地图：BM25 名词一览

Cells:
1. 稀疏检索 → 词项匹配 → 相对稠密向量
2. BM25 → 工业默认打分 → Lucene/ES
3. k1 → 词频饱和旋钮
4. b → 文档长度归一
5. posting list → 倒排承载打分
6. 多词查询 → 共有 term 分数累加
7. rank_bm25 → Python 试验库
8. Hybrid → 稀疏 + 稠密 → RRF/重排

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: binary-comparison.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 正排 vs 倒排

LEFT 正排 (coral):
- doc_id → 正文/分词/元数据
- 按书架每一本书记录
- 适合读全文，不适合全库找词

RIGHT 倒排 (mint):
- term → [(doc_id, tf), ...]
- 书末关键词索引
- 查「报销」立刻得 chunk 列表

Center: 2 万 chunk 不能每次全库扫描

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: structural-breakdown.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 倒排索引三块积木

1. 词典 (Dictionary) — term → posting 指针
2. Posting List — doc_id + tf (+ 位置可选)
3. 全局统计 — N, df, avgdl — BM25 用

Build: chunk 分词 → 累加 tf → 写 posting
Query: 查 term → 取 posting → 交集/并集 → 打分

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: bento-grid.
Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese.

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace.

Title: 综合概念地图：倒排索引一览

Cells:
1. 倒排索引 → term 找 doc → 毫秒级检索
2. 正排 → doc 找内容 → snippet 原文
3. 词典 → term 入口
4. Posting → 含该词的 doc 列表
5. tf → posting 里出现次数
6. 交集查询 → 多 term AND
7. BM25 → 在 posting 上算分
8. vs 向量库 → 稀疏/稠密并存

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.

Layout: binary-comparison — left vs right split with center divider.

Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy lines, stick figures, hand-lettered Simplified Chinese, coral red (#E8655A) for pain points, mint green (#7EC8A3) for benefits.

Title (top center): 稀疏向量 vs 稠密词向量

LEFT side (coral accent, label 稀疏 · TF-IDF / BoW):
- 维度 = 词表大小（几万～百万）
- 大部分位置是 0
- 「汽车」与「轿车」不同维 → 搜一个找不到另一个
- 可解释：能列出命中了哪些词
- 图标：稀疏点阵、高维柱状图

RIGHT side (mint accent, label 稠密 · Word2Vec):
- 维度固定（如 100～300）
- 每个数一般非零
- 语义相近的词向量靠近
- 一词一向量（静态）
- 图标：低维空间里的几个靠近的点

Center divider question: 要解决什么？→ 语义相似，而不只是字面重合

Bottom takeaway (bold): 稀疏检索快且可解释；稠密向量补「同义不同字」

Footer: Word2Vec / 静态词向量 · §2

All text Simplified Chinese. Legible, generous whitespace. One stick figure on each side.

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.

Layout: structural-breakdown — two panels side by side showing training architecture.

Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy arrows, hand-lettered Chinese, sky blue for CBOW panel, peach for Skip-gram panel.

Title (top center): Word2Vec 两种训练方式

LEFT panel — CBOW（Continuous Bag of Words）:
- 句子窗口示例：我 [爱] 自然 语言
- 上下文词（我、自然、语言）→ 箭头指向中心
- 任务：猜中间词「爱」
- 标签：适合高频词、训练较快

RIGHT panel — Skip-gram:
- 句子窗口：我 爱 [自然] 语言
- 中心词「自然」→ 箭头指向周围词
- 任务：用中心词猜上下文
- 标签：适合低频词、小语料常用

Bottom note: 共同思想：出现在相似上下文里的词，向量应该相近

Footer: Word2Vec / 静态词向量 · §5

All text Simplified Chinese. Clear arrows, window highlighted with dashed box. Small stick figure student observing.

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.

Layout: bento-grid — 8 compact cells in 2×4 grid.

Style: hand-drawn-edu — macaron pastel rounded cards on warm cream (#F5F0E8), wavy borders, hand-lettered Chinese, coral accents on key terms.

Title: 综合概念地图：本章名词一览
Subhead: 静态 = 一词一向量，不随上下文变

Cells:
1. 词向量 / Embedding → 词变成一串小数 → 语义用距离表示
2. 分布式假设 → 看上下文猜意思 → You shall know a word by the company it keeps
3. Word2Vec → 用神经网络学词向量 → 2013 经典静态向量
4. CBOW → 用上下文猜中间词 → 适合高频词
5. Skip-gram → 用中心词猜上下文 → 适合小语料
6. 静态向量 → 每个词只有一个向量 → bank 多义无法区分
7. 余弦相似度 → 比夹角不比长度 → 检索常用
8. 与 RAG → 稀疏一路 + 稠密一路 → Hybrid 检索

Distinct macaron colors per row. Stick figure with notebook in corner.

Footer: Word2Vec / 静态词向量 · §12

All text Simplified Chinese. Dense but readable.
